description: Letter from Hayya Gaon to Elhanan b. Shemarya, Fustat. February 7, 1018. The Gaon writes after he has been asked to write to Fustat on behalf of one of the community members in Baghdad, Ali b. Bishr, whose brother, Yosef b. Bishr, is in Fustat and needs help. The writer also informs Elhanan that the Sura Gaon Dosa b. Seadya passed away. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #39) VMR
description_he: מכתב מהאי גאון לאלחנן בן שמריה, פוסטאט, 7 בפברואר 1018, על סיוע לאחיו של אחד מבני הקהילה בבגדד ועל פטירת גאון סורא
